channel.title: How Biscuit
channel.description: Plain-language explainers and broad SEO experiments.

item.title: How Does Baking Powder Work?
item.description: A simple explanation of how baking powder makes batters and biscuits rise.

item.title: Why Are Some Answers Better Than Others?
item.description: A short explainer about what makes an answer useful, clear, and trustworthy.
